title: RideDeleted Event
description: Event emitted when a user deletes a ride from their history. Immutable and append-only.

rideId.description: UUID of the ride being deleted

userId.description: ID of the ride owner (user who created the ride). Must match deletedBy for user-initiated deletions.

deletedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the deletion was persisted to the event store. Set by the server.

deletedBy.description: ID of the user who requested the deletion. In the current design, always equals userId. Future use: may differ if admin deletion is implemented.

notes.immutability: This event is immutable. Once persisted to the event store, it is never modified or deleted.
notes.audit: This event is retained indefinitely in the event store for compliance and temporal queries.
notes.idempotency: Multiple deletion requests for the same ride will only append one RideDeleted event. Subsequent requests return idempotent success without appending duplicate events.
notes.backwards_compatibility: Future versions may allow deletedBy to differ from userId (e.g., for admin deletion). Consumers should not assume they are always equal.
